title: MCS Allays
description: This datapack aims to improve allay, it allows them to place torches in dark places and teleport to player!
body:
Main Information
===
* Creator and Developer: [​MC Silver]
* Minecraft Versions: 1.21+
* WIKI Version: 26.1v1
* For datapack developers: My datapack ignores all mobs that use data! (1.21.5+) \
  For custom mobs, use data; for non-custom mobs, use tags/scores!
* WARNING! (for PaperMC and PurpurMC Hosters): \
This datapack will only work correctly if you only change the below settings. \
Head over to your server, and go to "config/paper-world-defaults.yml" or "purpur.yml" file. \
Find this "allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards" and set that to true

Commands
===
All commands available to the player starts with /function .
---
Menu
---
- /function .menu:mcs_allays

Uninstall
---
- /function .uninstall:mcs_allays

Allay
====
* Helps light up the area if it is holding a torch and you have torches in your last hotbar slot
* Teleports to the player if it is more than 17 blocks away, unless it is linked to a Note Block
* Like Vexes, it is now immune to drowning and fire damage
* Heals the player and itself if the player has an Amethyst Shard in the last hotbar slot
* Assists the player in battle and deals 4 damage to entities:
1. That attack the player
2. Attacked by the player

![Allay and player must hold torches like this!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e55648f6c2af2e19860d5adf9da71e288d40ff6.png)
